title: agalinis maritima
intro: Agalinis maritima, also known as Seaside False Dragonhead, is a perennial plant species native to the coastal regions of North America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Agalinis maritima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Agalinis maritima is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
